name: risingwave
description: RisingWave is an event streaming platform for agentic AI that continuously ingests data from databases, event streams, and webhooks, processes it incrementally, and serves fresh results at low latency — replacing the traditional streaming stack (Debezium + Kafka + Flink + serving DB) with a single Postgres-compatible system. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
